# PERF-81 positive: sqlx IN (?) expands an unbounded slice
lang: go
file: PERF-081-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"

type User struct {
	ID    int64  `db:"id"`
	Email string `db:"email"`
}

func FindByIDs(db *sqlx.DB, ids []int64) ([]User, error) {
	var users []User
	err := db.Select(&users, "SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE id IN (?)", ids)
	return users, err
}
